$comment: azure-mi-ai-dba-demo — MCP server config EXAMPLE. Copy to mcp.config.json (git-ignored) and fill via env vars. NO secrets/connection strings hardcoded. Principle: READ-ONLY diagnostics; state changes require human approval via a separate path.

mssql.$comment: VS Code mssql extension / MCP for read-only DB metadata & DMV queries against the game DB.

azure.$comment: Azure MCP (microsoft/mcp) for Log Analytics, Defender for SQL, resource metadata. Auth via az login / managed identity (DefaultAzureCredential).

policy.notes: Diagnosis/inspection is read-only. Any DDL/DML (index create, plan guide, config change) is proposed as a script and applied only after explicit human approval.
